login.title: Student Login
login.subtitle: Enter your student ID to access the exam

rules.minLength: Student ID must be at least 2 characters

errors.generic: Login failed. Please check your student ID and try again.

config.title: System Configuration
config.subtitle: Please complete server and configuration file setup before starting the exam.

server.title: Server Settings
server.fetchConfigSuccess: Successfully fetched config file from server
server.fetchConfigFailed: Failed to fetch config file from server

welcome.helpText: If you cannot log in, please contact the proctor or TA.

errors.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please check your student ID or contact the TA.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later or contact the TA.

judge.noResult: There is no test result to display.

notificationCenter.title: Realtime Alerts
notificationCenter.subtitle: Stay synced with backend messages & config
notificationCenter.autoSync: Auto sync runs every 60 seconds. Latest sync: {time}
notificationCenter.noNotificationsSubtext: Stay online to receive live socket messages.

finisheTheExam.label: Finish the Exam
finisheTheExam.finisheTheExamIntro: Please follow the following steps to complete your exam:
finisheTheExam.end: After finish all steps, please notify TA to check your submission. Please do not turn off this window unless TA confirms your submission is received.

upload.title: Upload Code for {name}
upload.label: Select a source file to upload
upload.description: Please select the source code file you want to upload.
